full_text:
Zhang Ji (Derong) 張既 (德容)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhang Ji (張既), styledDerong (德容), was born in Zuopingyi. Persuaded Ma Teng to help Cao Cao, he was a major part in the pacification of Liang. Zhang Ji was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom. Zhang Ji lived during the Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
